case_title: TRI COMMERCIAL REAL ESTATE SERVICES VS MINET, INC. ATTN: HARRIS, TERRY MS.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY TRI COMMERCIAL REAL ESTATE SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT MINET, INC.      ATTN: HARRIS, TERRY MS. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MINET, INC.      ATTN: HARRIS, TERRY MS. HEARING SET FOR JAN-05-1996 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRI COMMERCIAL REAL ESTATE SERVICES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MINET, INC.      ATTN: HARRIS, TERRY MS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
